Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:


- [Morimens Compendium](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509) by Mythag University
- [Game Mechanics](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1417994340177022981) by Mythag University
- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University
- [Damage Formula](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1384463374213189652) by Jynn              
- [How To Aliemus 101 & 102](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1387172781829128304) by Jynn  
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1477730088299663431) by Cheri
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University
You can refer to the handbook for a new player guide
For your team in particular. If you still have standard pulls, you can look into blue (the most beginner friendly realm). High floor, low ceiling
Limiteds wise, you can look into getting Kathigura (yellow lady) on the triple rerun banner
She will want 3 dupes eventually which you should be able to get it

Murphy's exalt halves the damage you receive and converts it to Sacrifice. You can then reduce that sacrifice by her 3-cost. She's one of my faves when it comes to sustaining. She also comes with Keyflare, though not having retain on her 3-cost does hurt her kit quite a bit as new players might think that she's killing your team herself.

Horla is a great support. She has stances and you switch stances by playing her cards first in the turn. Red stance is a damage bonus , Blue stance provides additional shielding, Yellow stance allows you to save unused arithmetica up until you switch stances,  and purple stances increases Str generation. Very versatile support but quite the wordful kit.

24 - I don't have any comment. I don't use her and for runs that I watch in D-tide that use her she is paired with Daffodil so that the player can nuke the boss by turn 3.

embeds.title: Morimens
embeds.description: "Morimens" is a roguelite card\-battling game set in a world inspired by the Cthulhu mythos\. Within the game, you will connect with a diverse array of awaker, each with distinct personalities, to construct a unique strategic deck tailored to your playstyle\. Venture into the misty expanse of the ga

you can just try out units that you like at the start, when you get stuck or cant clear is when you ask on what to change
Hard pity is at 90 per copy. As long as you clear story up to chapter 3/4 you're more than likely to get minimally 2 copies (base + 1 dupe)
From there you can use prototype horizon for the monthly dupe on her twice
Kath works well with ultra units. Some Blue is fine too. Eventually you'll want units from all realm for 19 characters

You want these wheels on your supports.

Aged 
Whisper
Gluttony (abandon the orison foe hp)

It gives you enough exalt energy to exalt
Once you use it, display wise nothing changes
You deal 30% max health damage to the boss, and heal for some
Your 3 cost then begins applying poison instead of healing you
So daff is dps and rest are support

I tried Ryker instead of Gramona in my Kath team.
... he's very strong... The tutor is quite similar to Gramona's one except it could be even better in case of crit. The Exalt can draw a lot of cards. GRamona is more suitable for Kath if you "play well" and optimize cards from last turn, and gives some keyflare, but Ryker can draw more... 6 is insane... Even in this case I rate them similarly. What makes the difference, and a big one, are Rykers relics tho. That 8hedron dice is huge in a boss fight... I really like him so far. Personally I find him an upgrade of Gramona (not a crazy one but still better)
Different uses but yes ryker is commonly used
Note on GRamona tutor: i have considered it just like the pure basic card. Tbh he could be better than this
